config.title: <%so.write trans_.var(100)%>
config.script:
@@nxub_script_include_inject_marker@@
function fopen() : fopen = true
set_initial_focus1 end function
function btn_showlist() page_.result = 1 page_.goback end function
function btn_filter() page_.result = 2 page_.goback end function
function btn_cancel() page_.result = 0 page_.goback end function
function init_on_params(byref pParameters) <% iter = 1 for each pParam in pParamArray if not pParam.autoanswer then so.write "init_on_param" + cstr(iter) + " pParameters(" + cstr(iter-1) + ")" + vbCrLf so.write "update_controls" + cstr(iter) + vbCrLf end if iter = iter + 1 next %> end function
function update_params(byref pParameters) <% iter = 1 for each pParam in pParamArray if not pParam.autoanswer then so.write "update_param" + cstr(iter) + " pParameters(" + cstr(iter-1) + ")" + vbCrLf end if iter = iter + 1 next %> end function
@@nxub_script_code_inject_marker@@

page.body:
<% .newtable.newsection "tbody",FORM_SPAN
iter = 1 for each pParam in pParamArray if not pParam.autoanswer then pParam.build_ui_part nxub_,iter end if iter = iter + 1 next
.newgroup 1,"Przyciski" .newrow.newcell.e_space(1).newrowex("style='STYLE_ROW_BTN'").newcellex 1,"keepline='true'" %> Pokaż listę Filtruj wyniki Anuluj
<% .flush end with %>
